name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement

---

## What Do You Want?

Describe the feature or workflow you want to improve.

## Why Is It Useful?

Explain the use case and who benefits from it.

## Suggested Behavior

Describe how it should work in the app.

## Notes

Add screenshots, examples, provider details, or compatibility concerns if relevant.
